metadata.no_auto_align_reason: Standalone TrackCenter and clear strong-pi pODMR support r03; use the current tracked position directly and avoid hidden target reselection.

analysis_plan.notes: No automatic fit request is included. Review raw readouts and normalization first; fit/use a center only after signal presence is supported.

metadata.frequency_window_reason: Covers +/-10 MHz around the strong-pi center with ~1 MHz spacing, several times the expected weak-pi excitation width and enough to absorb the coarse strong-pi center uncertainty.
metadata.shot_reason: Use 4 x 50000 = 200000 total shots to meet calibration/scout SNR guidance while keeping even snake-scan averages.
metadata.even_average_reason: Use 4 averages under snake/even-average guidance; r03 strong-pi drift analysis flagged no averages but recent advisory risk was high.
metadata.intent: image145844_reimage_r03 weak-pi pODMR frequency calibration after clear strong-pi alignment screen; no automatic fit/Aux update; terminal raw/readout review required before Ramsey/T2star.

recipe.name: xml_generic_v1
notes: Generic XML route backed by a sequence manifest.
This is the only mainline recipe in the bridge; ODMR, Rabi, Ramsey, and future sequences should all enter through xml_generic_v1.
validate_job.m resolves sequence_manifest_id and enforces manifest bounds before any execute path is reached; job sample_id owns target identity.
Execute remains subject to the same explicit lab-only opt-in gate used by earlier curated routes.
Archived curated wrappers and recipe definitions are preserved under claw/legacy for historical reference only.

manifest.label: Pulsed ODMR (Rabimodulated)
manifest.description: Staging proposal that repurposes Rabimodulated.xml for pulsed ODMR by scanning mw_freq while keeping the Rabimodulated pulse structure.
notes: Staging-only proposal requested after ODMR_withRef.xml hit a RunExperiment channel-shape mismatch while Rabimodulated.xml executed successfully.
Intended as a safer pulsed ODMR draft that keeps the Rabimodulated pulse structure and changes the scan axis to mw_freq.
Review the fixed length_rabi_pulse operating point before supervised execute.
Generated from base manifest rabi_v1.

Typed-only defaults overridden: ampIQ, delay_wrt_1mus, detuning, freqIQ, full_expt, length_last_wait, mod_depth, mw_ampl, mw_freq, pumping_time, sample_rate, sweep_range, sweep_time, switch_delay, wait_time
Manual post-edit after authoring: scan_schema narrowed to mw_freq for pulsed ODMR use.
Manual post-edit after authoring: added fixed length_rabi_pulse default (52 ns) and do_adiabatic_inversion typed default from Rabimodulated.xml.
2026-05-04 cleanup: retargeted manifest to canonical Rabimodulated.xml; obsolete staging XML copy was archived.
Loaded sequence manifest from <MATLAB_23C_ROOT>\claw\sequence_manifests\staging\pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1.json.

tracking_cadence_policy.does_not_change: Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults
Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults

guidance.shot_preservation_guidance: When the predicted per-average tracking window is too long, first reduce repetitions per average and compensate by increasing averages so repetitions * averages remains as close as possible to the original total shots. If that is still insufficient, split the acquisition into shorter jobs. Reduce total shots only as a last resort.
adjustment_priority: raise averages to preserve repetitions * averages whenever possible
split the acquisition into shorter jobs before reducing total shots
reduce total shots only as a last resort
